other_observers: Brandon Percival, Dave Silverman, Van Truan, Margie Joy, and many others; Brandon Percival found this bird a few days earlier. He also has identifiable photos.
specific_location: near South Shore Marina, Pueblo Reservoir State Park
description: This was one of the 5 loon species. Overall the coloration was light gray. The bill, short, thin and light gray was frequently held at an angle above the horizontal. The face was whitish and the back was medium gray and checkered. The neck was grayish without noticeable contrast or markings.Behaviors: Rolled forward into a dive freqently.Call: none heardPlumage: First winter
